name: Murph
description: A mile run bookending 100 pull-ups, 200 push-ups, and 300 air squats, traditionally performed in a weighted vest and often partitioned into rounds of 5-10-20 — one of the most widely recognized Hero WODs.
source_notes: crossfit.com/heroes (official CrossFit Hero and Tribute Workouts page), retrieved 2026-07-08; partition pull-ups/push-ups/squats as needed, per official prescription
